//: Pure-core build for the fast node:test path (split test toolchains by axis). Lists ONLY the RN-free modules: the resolver, the launch-state types/source, the workspace entry, the auth domain's pure core (types + provider/adapter logic behind an injected client port), and the chat runtime's dev adapter (its `@assistant-ui/react-native` import is type-only, erased on compile). The barrel (index.ts), the store (.tsx), the screens, `companion-chat.tsx` (imports the vendor package at runtime), and `auth/service/neon-client.ts` (imports expo) belong to the navigation axis — they are compiled by Metro and type-checked by the full tsconfig.json, never here, so node:test never loads React Native.
